---
title: Water Cherenkov PID v0 Schema Notes
description: Pending schema notes for Water Cherenkov particle-identification submissions.
---

Schema details are pending.

This page should eventually define event-display tensors, timing summaries, particle-label fields, split names, and the HDF5 submission layout expected by the validation service.

## Expected coverage

| Area | Notes |
| --- | --- |
| Files | HDF5 group layout, event keys, and shard naming |
| Inputs | Ring images, timing summaries, calibration metadata, and geometry references |
| Targets | Particle labels and class taxonomy |
| Splits | Public training, validation, and hidden evaluation split policy |
| Submission | Required prediction fields for `opendc eval send <submission.h5>` |
